Guo Chun йғӯзҙ”
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Chun (йғӯзҙ”). On fall of Shu, led raid into Jing but Zhongli Mu was able to defeat ChunвҖҷs tribesmen. Guo Chun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
